description: Filling ALL valid values clears errors, flips signup.isValid true, and ENABLES the disabled submit gate (§41.14.3 + §55.5, Bug-61 lock). name "Alice", email "alice@example.com", agree checked → every field isValid true, errors empty, the compound proxy reflects {name,email,agree}, and disabled=!signup.isValid removes the attribute (submit enabled).
rationale: §41.14.3 default submit is disabled=!@signup.isValid; §55.5 the rollup flips true once all fields pass. The reactive gate effect then removes the disabled attribute. The compound cell value collects the typed field values (bind → dotted cell → proxy).
